economic_notes: Flying Dust operates business enterprises in construction services, real estate services, energy services, and retail services. Business enterprises include FDB Fuels Inc., FDB Holding Corporation, FDB Gravel Inc., Flying Dust Power Corporation Ltd., Flying Energy Oil & Gas Limited Partnership, Flying Energy Inc., Snipe & Celly Pro Shop Inc., and 625706 Saskatchewan Ltd. COVID-19 impacted operations through distancing measures and reduced gaming revenues but total revenues were not negatively impacted as ISC increased funding.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2021. Consolidated entity includes 6 subsidiaries (Flying Dust First Nation, Flying Dust CMHC Housing Program, Flying Dust Market Garden Ltd., Flying Dust Housing Corporation, Flying Dust Community Development Fund, Flying Dust Security Inc.) and 8 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Flying Dust Treaty Land Entitlement Trust is excluded from consolidation as it is administered by independent trustees. ISC term loan of $831,549 due on demand related to 1932 Specific Claim. Net debt of $13,243,648. COVID-19 noted as impacting operations but ISC increased funding to compensate. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, MLTC Health, MLTC Child & Family, MLTC Program Services, CMHC, Province of Saskatchewan, Northwest School Division, Government of Canada, and MLTC RDI transfers. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text.
